category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device compliance comparison for Cuba market entry (MINCOM / ETECSA).

title.en: China-to-Cuba Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (MINCOM / ETECSA)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入古巴：合规差距矩阵（MINCOM / ETECSA）
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入古巴：合規差距矩陣（MINCOM / ETECSA）

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device documentation against Cuban MINCOM (Ministerio de Comunicaciones) mandatory homologación (type approval for radio and telecom terminal equipment), NC (Normas Cubanas) electrical safety and EMC standards harmonised with IEC/ISO/ITU, the Cuban state-entity importer requirement under ETECSA (Empresa de Telecomunicaciones de Cuba S.A.) and MINCOM-authorized state enterprises, and the MINCOM cybersecurity framework under Decree-Law 35 (2021) and Decree 360 (2019). Cuba operates a dual-voltage system — 110 V / 60 Hz (residential, US-legacy) and 220 V / 60 Hz (commercial) — with Type A/B (US/Canada-style) plugs prevalent. MINCOM homologación is mandatory before import or commercial placement; CCC and CE marks are not independently recognised, though Chinese supplier technical documentation is typically accepted in MINCOM review given strong China-Cuba bilateral ties and ETECSA's extensive use of Chinese telecommunications infrastructure. Cuba is a BRI member and China is its top trading partner. Private import channels are severely limited — state entities (ETECSA, CIMEX, and MINCOM-authorized enterprises) dominate equipment procurement. US dollar transactions are affected by the US embargo; CNY and euro payment routes are commonly used. ONN (Oficina Nacional de Normalización) administers NC standards.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备文件与古巴MINCOM（通信部）强制型式认可（针对无线电及电信终端设备的型号核准）、NC（古巴国家标准）电气安全和EMC标准（与IEC/ISO/ITU协调）、古巴国家实体进口商要求（ETECSA及MINCOM授权国家企业）以及Decree-Law 35（2021）和Decree 360（2019）下MINCOM网络安全框架的差距对照。古巴采用双电压系统——110V/60Hz（住宅，美国遗留）和220V/60Hz（商业）——A/B型（美国/加拿大式）插头普遍。在进口或商业销售前须取得MINCOM型式认可；CCC和CE标志不被独立承认，但鉴于中古双边关系密切及ETECSA广泛使用中国电信基础设施，中国供应商技术文件通常在MINCOM审查中被接受。古巴是"一带一路"成员国，中国是其最大贸易伙伴。私人进口渠道极为有限——国家实体（ETECSA、CIMEX及MINCOM授权企业）主导设备采购。美元交易受美国禁运影响；通常使用人民币和欧元支付路线。ONN（国家标准化办公室）管理NC标准。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置文件與古巴MINCOM（通信部）強制型式認可（針對無線電及電信終端裝置的型號核准）、NC（古巴國家標準）電氣安全和EMC標準（與IEC/ISO/ITU協調）、古巴國家實體進口商要求（ETECSA及MINCOM授權國家企業）以及Decree-Law 35（2021）和Decree 360（2019）下MINCOM網路安全框架的差距對照。古巴採用雙電壓系統——110V/60Hz（住宅，美國遺留）和220V/60Hz（商業）——A/B型（美國/加拿大式）插頭普遍。在進口或商業銷售前須取得MINCOM型式認可；CCC和CE標誌不被獨立承認，但鑑於中古雙邊關係密切及ETECSA廣泛使用中國電信基礎設施，中國供應商技術文件通常在MINCOM審查中被接受。古巴是「一帶一路」成員國，中國是其最大貿易夥伴。私人進口管道極為有限——國家實體（ETECSA、CIMEX及MINCOM授權企業）主導設備採購。美元交易受美國禁運影響；通常使用人民幣和歐元路線。ONN（國家標準化辦公室）管理NC標準。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, MINCOM homologación, ONN certification, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current MINCOM resolutions, NC standards, ONN requirements, ETECSA procurement procedures, Cuban state-entity importer requirements, Cuba's dual-voltage (110 V / 220 V, 60 Hz) electrical system, Type A/B plug compatibility, Cuban customs regulations, Spanish labelling rules, Decree-Law 35 (2021) cybersecurity obligations, and US embargo implications with qualified regulatory and legal professionals before shipment or sale in Cuba.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、MINCOM型式认可、ONN认证、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在向古巴发货或销售前，应与合格监管和法律专业人士核验现行MINCOM决议、NC标准、ONN要求、ETECSA采购程序、古巴国家实体进口商要求、古巴双电压（110V/220V，60Hz）电气系统、A/B型插头兼容性、古巴海关法规、西班牙语标签规则、Decree-Law 35（2021）网络安全义务及美国禁运影响。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、MINCOM型式認可、ONN認證、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在向古巴發貨或銷售前，應與合格監管和法律專業人士核驗現行MINCOM決議、NC標準、ONN要求、ETECSA採購程序、古巴國家實體進口商要求、古巴雙電壓（110V/220V，60Hz）電氣系統、A/B型插頭相容性、古巴海關法規、西班牙語標籤規則、Decree-Law 35（2021）網路安全義務及美國禁運影響。

answer_first.en: The main Cuba compliance gaps for a China-made Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or IoT device are: MINCOM mandatory homologación — all radio and telecom terminal equipment requires MINCOM type approval before import or commercial placement, with no independent recognition of CCC, CE, or SRRC approvals (though Chinese technical documentation is typically accepted given strong bilateral ties and ETECSA's established procurement of Chinese equipment); state-entity importer requirement — private importers are largely unavailable, and equipment must be procured through ETECSA, CIMEX, or other MINCOM-authorized state enterprises; NC (Normas Cubanas) electrical safety and EMC compliance harmonised with IEC/ISO; compatibility with Cuba's dual-voltage system (110 V and 220 V, both 60 Hz) and Type A/B plugs; and cybersecurity compliance under Decree-Law 35 (2021) and Decree 360 (2019) administered by MINCOM. Spanish labelling is required. US dollar restrictions from the embargo affect payment routes — CNY and euro channels are commonly used for China-Cuba trade.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的Wi-Fi、蓝牙或物联网设备进入古巴的主要合规差距为：MINCOM强制型式认可——所有无线电及电信终端设备在进口或商业销售前须取得MINCOM型号核准，CCC、CE或SRRC核准不被独立承认（但鉴于双边关系密切及ETECSA对中国设备的成熟采购经验，中国技术文件通常被接受）；国家实体进口商要求——私人进口商基本缺失，设备须通过ETECSA、CIMEX或其他MINCOM授权国家企业采购；与IEC/ISO协调的NC（古巴国家标准）电气安全和EMC合规；与古巴双电压系统（110V和220V，均为60Hz）及A/B型插头的兼容性；以及MINCOM管辖下Decree-Law 35（2021）和Decree 360（2019）规定的网络安全合规。须使用西班牙语标签。禁运导致的美元限制影响支付路线——中古贸易通常使用人民币和欧元渠道。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的Wi-Fi、藍牙或物聯網裝置進入古巴的主要合規差距為：MINCOM強制型式認可——所有無線電及電信終端裝置在進口或商業銷售前須取得MINCOM型號核准，CCC、CE或SRRC核准不被獨立承認（但鑑於雙邊關係密切及ETECSA對中國設備的成熟採購經驗，中國技術文件通常被接受）；國家實體進口商要求——私人進口商基本缺失，設備須透過ETECSA、CIMEX或其他MINCOM授權國家企業採購；與IEC/ISO協調的NC（古巴國家標準）電氣安全和EMC合規；與古巴雙電壓系統（110V和220V，均為60Hz）及A/B型插頭的相容性；以及MINCOM管轄下Decree-Law 35（2021）和Decree 360（2019）規定的網路安全合規。須使用西班牙語標籤。禁運導致的美元限制影響支付路線——中古貿易通常使用人民幣和歐元管道。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
